Arching stems completely covered in small white double flowers in Aprilâ€“May, before most leaves fully emerge, creating the cascading 'bridal veil' effect. No fall rebloom â€” this is a one-flush spring bloomer. Blooms on old wood â€” prune immediately after flowering; never prune in fall or winter or you remove next year's buds.
